steps.title: Substitute x = 7
steps.content:
The expression is $x+20$. Since the problem gives $x=7$, replace $x$ with $7$:
$$x+20=7+20$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is just $20$ without adding $x$. Choice D adds $27$ to $x$. The correct substitution gives $27$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $27$ matches choice C, so C is correct.
